description: NSDC India is the website of the National Skill Development Corporation, an Indian organization focused on skilling, training partnerships, and related programs and initiatives. Its public website primarily provides informational pages, scheme portals, and links to associated services.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found on nsdcindia.org itself; the site appears to be a public information portal that links out to other products and support systems on different domains/subdomains.
